reasoning_content:
The issue is that my StartOfLine detection is still wrong. Looking at the expected output:

```
int 'int'	 [StartOfLine] Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:1:1>
identifier 'main'	 [LeadingSpace] Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:1:5>
l_paren '('		Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:1:9>
r_paren ')'		Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:1:10>
l_brace '{'		Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:1:11>
return 'return'	 [StartOfLine] [LeadingSpace]	Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:2:5>
numeric_constant '3'	 [LeadingSpace] Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:2:12>
semi ';'		Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:2:13>
r_brace '}'	 [StartOfLine] Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:3:1>
eof ''		Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:3:2>
```

My output:
```
int 'int'	 [StartOfLine] Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:1:1>


```

I see the problem now. The lexer is incorrectly marking tokens as [StartOfLine] when they shouldn't be. The tokens like '(', ')', and '{' are being incorrectly flagged, which doesn't match the expected output. I need to refine the logic for determining when a token is at the start of a line.

The key insight is that StartOfLine should only be true for the very first token on a line, not for every token. This means I'll need to track the previous token's line number and compare it with the current token's line number.

```
I'm tracking the line mapping carefully. The preprocessed file has line markers that complicate the line number tracking. I need to ensure I'm correctly mapping the preprocessed line numbers to the actual source file line numbers, accounting for the line markers that don't correspond to actual source lines.

The key challenge is handling the line markers that don't map to source lines while maintaining the correct line number progression for actual code lines. I'll need to adjust my line mapping logic to skip these marker lines and only increment the source line counter for genuine code lines.
```

tool_call.name: file_editor

summary: Fix StartOfLine detection to use previous token line
